narrative: An eight‑year Search Engineer at Sarvam AI, a product‑first AI startup, offers strong hands‑on experience building retrieval systems. Their work with scikit‑learn, PyTorch, Milvus and Weaviate aligns directly with the deep‑learning and vector‑search components of the Senior AI/ML role, and familiarity with BM25 adds classic ranking expertise. Experience level matches the 5‑9 year band and Gurgaon proximity fits the Pune/Noida location requirement. The primary ranking driver is a below‑average JD relevance score, which kept them in the middle of the shortlist. A minor credibility flag and an unknown notice period remain the main caveats.
